zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Huntingfield於大約1261年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可亨廷費爾德時，他的父親William Huntingfield25歲，母親Emma Grey27歲。他於1277年與Joyce Engaine結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1302年12月5日在英國林可爾史爾福藍普頓享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Huntingfield was born about 1261, in Huntingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Huntingfield, was 25 and his mother, Emma Grey, was 27. He married Joyce Engaine in 1277. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 5 December 1302, in Frampton, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Huntingfield est né environ 1261, à Huntingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Huntingfield, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Emma Grey, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Joyce Engaine en 1277. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 5 décembre 1302, à Frampton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.Huntingfield, Blything, Suffolk, England: Huntingfield with Cookley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Huntingfield um 1261 in Huntingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Huntingfield 25 und seine Mutter Emma Grey 27. Er hat 1277 Joyce Engaine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Dezember 1302 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Frampton, Lincolnshire, England.

Lui sposato Joyce Engaine nel 1277. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 5 dicembre 1302, nel Frampton, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 42 anni.

ko.Huntingfield, Blything, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 헌틴그필드 위스 쿡리
ko.lifeSummary: Roger Huntingfield(이)가 대략 1261년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 헌틴그필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Huntingfield(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma Grey(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1277년 Joyce Engaine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1302년 12월 5일 영국 링코실르 프램프턴에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Joyce Engaine em 1277. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de dezembro de 1302, em Frampton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 42 anos.

ru.Huntingfield, Blything, Suffolk, England: хантингфиелд вит кукли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Huntingfield родился около 1261 г. в местности хантингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Huntingfield было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Grey, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Joyce Engaine в 1277 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 5 декабря 1302 г. в местности фрамптон, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 42 лет.
